title_of_original: State Aid SA.38330 (2016/FC) - Poland Alleged unlawful regional investment aid to PCC MCAA sp. Zo.o (PCC)
case_description: On the 1st of March 2016 the Portuguese Ministry of Economy released permit NO 134. This permit entitled XCA Lda (hereinafter XCA) to conduct business activities in the “FUTURE-PARK” Alentejo Special Economic Zone and invoked an exemption from corporate income tax for income from the investment. The permit specified the maximum amount of eligible investment costs as 69 999 999 €. The maximum amount of the tax exemption was not stated in the permit. The Portuguese authorities later published a calculation, stating that the maximum value of the corporate income tax exemption amounts to EUR 7543234 €.
